title: felicia drakensbergensis
intro: Felicia drakensbergensis, also known as the Drakensberg felicia or Drakensberg blue felicia, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, Asteraceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Felicia drakensbergensis include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to soothe digestive problems and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Felicia drakensbergensis include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
